_comment: Schema for image versions 2026.1.x: MethodTypesConfiguration + models referenced by Name (no Id Guid). For 2026.2+ use aiconfiguration.json instead. To use this, copy it over aiconfiguration.json before deploy.

AzureAi.Description: Azure OpenAI / AI Foundry. ApiKey and Endpoint are Key Vault secret NAMES, resolved at runtime via the Managed Identity.

ProviderModels.Name: Azure GPT (sandbox)
ProviderModels.Description: Sandbox model. ModelName values are your Azure deployment names.
